settings.title:
BORN FROM
THE CULTURE
settings.subtitle: Vintage streetwear, premium sneakers, and collectibles — hand-picked from the culture in Abilene, TX.
settings.story_body:
Runitback Classics was born in Abilene, TX in 2024 with a simple idea: great vintage streetwear and rare sneakers shouldn't be hard to find. We dug through the racks so you don't have to.

Every piece we carry is hand-inspected, verified authentic, and one of a kind. Whether you're chasing a grail pair of Jordans or searching for that perfect vintage Champion hoodie, we've got you.
settings.mission_body:
We believe style shouldn't break the bank. Pre-owned doesn't mean second rate — vintage pieces carry history, character, and culture that new releases simply can't replicate.

Beyond the product, we're a community. Come through the shop, bring your pieces for trade, or catch us every Thursday at 6:35PM on Instagram Live for Thirsty Thursday auctions.

settings.ticker_text: BUY · SELL · TRADE|100% AUTHENTIC PIECES|THIRSTY THURSDAY LIVE AUCTIONS|NEW DROPS EVERY WEEK|EST. 2024 · ABILENE TX
